since_last: 63% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.63%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.41% · Gold +0.34% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 63% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.63%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.63%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.24%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +20.10%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +20.10%, CEVA +6.71%, PWR +2.77%, SMCI +2.49%, AMAT +2.45%. Laggards: DLR -5.04%, TTD -2.09%, HON -1.81%, WDAY -1.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.59% at $163.22
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
